title: Vitality Tower Signal Watch
topic: daemon, watcher, service, and projection change accounting
skill_description: Watch town signals, separate operational churn from real changes, and emit concise recovery/accounting digests.
review_reason: mayor reviews stale modules, false progress, accepted changes, and recovery priority
quality_rules: Separate operational evidence from domain evidence.
No-change cycles must not inflate progress claims.
Every alert must include a source signal, severity, and next check/action.
skill_rules: Inspect watcher records, daemon health, and projection freshness together.
Prefer factual digests over motivational status copy.
Return stale or ambiguous signals as reviewable recovery questions.

participants.title: Daemon Watch Desk
participants.perspective: A town is 24/7 only if its daemon state is inspectable and restart-safe.
participants.current_question: Is the daemon alive, stale, failed, or merely idle?
participants.contribution: Provides heartbeat, worker PID, tick result, and restart evidence.

participants.title: Book Change Accounting Desk
participants.perspective: Generated logs and retries should not count as domain knowledge progress.
participants.current_question: Which book changed in a domain-relevant way since the prior check?
participants.contribution: Provides changed pages, evidence type, accepted facts, and no-change records.

participants.title: Recovery Queue Desk
participants.perspective: Warnings should become prioritized recovery work or be retired.
participants.current_question: Which warning should trigger recovery, escalation, or suppression?
participants.contribution: Provides alert severity, owner module, retry history, and next action.
